prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Fork a sibling worktree. Default path `../<repo-name>-m3-quality`, default bra

risks_fired.evidence: Multi-step shell sequence with defaults invites Claude to narrate a plan; body 'Paste the prompt as-is' and the imperative lead-in mitigate.
risks_fired.fix_hint: No edit required; if preamble inflates in cohort, add a one-clause closer like 'Run, then report.' inside the fence.

risks_fired.evidence: Body paragraph 'Clean main is the safe default; pick another branch if you have a reason. Switch now if you need to.' surfaces the base-branch choice before paste, neutralising in-prompt defaults.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Carve-out applies via body callout; no in-prompt edit needed.

risks_fired.evidence: Closer 'Report the four lines back. Then wait.' anchors action and idle; preamble unlikely to inflate.
